_comment: TEST sweep on the game's default map (the planet). Tiny grid to validate the pipeline, the graceful-interrupt behavior, and to MEASURE per-game wall time before sizing sweep_planet_overnight.json. One neutral 'probe' strategy so every axis is a clean parameter (no per-tick setTax override); focus is break-finding, not strategy comparison. Run: node harness.js sweep_planet_test.json  (or npm run sweep:test)
